mapper.insert: insert into pptask (room_id, person_name, title, number, number_left, integral, status, create_time, expire_time) values (#{pt.roomId}, #{pt.personName}, #{pt.title}, #{pt.number}, #{pt.number}, #{pt.integral}, 1, now(), #{pt.expireTime})
mapper.select: select * from pptask_claim where task_id = #{taskId} order by claim_time desc
mapper.update: update pptask_claim set status = #{status} where id = #{id}
mapper.sql: id, room_address, room_id, total_number, computed_number, person_address, person_name
mapper.update: update pp_task set completed_number = completed_number + 1, received_number = received_number - 1, status = CASE WHEN completed_number + 1 = total_number THEN 'DONE' ELSE status END where id = #{id} and completed_number < total_number and received_number >= 0
update pp_task set received_number = received_number - 1 where id = #{id} and received_number >= 0
update pp_task set received_number = received_number + 1 where id = #{id} and received_number <total_number
mapper.select: select t.* from pp_task t where not exists ( select 1 from pp_task_claim c where c.room_id = t.room_id and c.device_id = #{deviceId} ) order by t.begin_time asc limit 1 for update
